# withjp.ai — Juan Pablo Guaman Rodriguez

> Software Architect & Full Stack Developer | WhatsApp Business API Automation | 25,000+ students
> Loja, Ecuador | info@withjp.ai

## Who is JP?

Juan Pablo Guaman Rodriguez (online: **desertbarret**, **@jp.desertbarret**) is a Software Architect and Full Stack Developer based in Loja, Ecuador. 10+ years of professional experience in web, mobile, automation, and AI systems.

## Primary Service: WhatsApp Business Automation

withjp.ai specializes in automating customer service workflows via the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta):

- **FAQ automation**: instant responses to common questions 24/7
- **Order tracking**: real-time status updates via WhatsApp
- **Appointment scheduling**: booking flows via WhatsApp
- **Post-sale support**: structured issue resolution and escalation
- **Transactional notifications**: order confirmations, reminders, alerts

Product page: https://withjp.ai/whatsapp

## Courses & Academy

17 courses on Udemy with 25,000+ students worldwide. Topics: Flutter, NestJS, React, TypeScript, Kotlin, Android, AI.

- Course catalog: https://withjp.ai/cursos
- JP Academy (exclusive): https://withjp.ai/academia
- Udemy profile: https://www.udemy.com/user/juan-pablo-guaman-rodriguez/

## Blog

Technical articles on WhatsApp automation, Flutter, NestJS, React and software development:
https://withjp.ai/blog

- Website: https://withjp.ai

## Technical Competencies

Backend: NestJS, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, REST APIs
Frontend: Vue 3, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
Mobile: Flutter 3, Kotlin, React Native
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis
DevOps: Docker, nginx, GCP (Cloud SQL, Cloud Run)
Automation: WhatsApp Business API, n8n, bots
AI: LLM integration, Claude API, OpenAI
